sub_pixel_system.notes: Doom engine derivative; sub-pixel precision not documented

character_classes.name: Fighter (Baratus)
character_classes.description: Close-quarters physical attacks with mundane and magical weapons; tougher and faster than other characters

character_classes.name: Cleric (Parias)
character_classes.description: Combination of melee and ranged capabilities; middle ground between Fighter and Mage

character_classes.name: Mage (Daedolon)
character_classes.description: Long-range spells with counterbalance of fragility; slowest moving character class

special_mechanics.name: Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Jump capability introduced in modified Doom engine

special_mechanics.name: Polyobjects (moving walls)
special_mechanics.description: Pseudo-moving walls implemented via one-sided lines rendered at desired start position. Does not allow moving sectors or tops of moving doors

physics_values.limitation: cannot move sectors with multiple nodes

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Game uses modified Doom engine. Three character classes have distinct movement speeds (Fighter fastest, Mage slowest), but precise physics values not documented. Wikipedia and TCRF sources do not provide numerical movement parameters, gravity values, or jump physics constants.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Hexen: Beyond Heretic (gameplay and development sections)
